title: KPop Demon Hunters Wins Two Critics Choice Awards
text: The Netflix animated film claimed victories in two categories at the 2026 Critics Choice Awards, marking a strong start to the awards season. The movie secured honors for best animated feature and best original song. The song Golden, which features EJAE as the singing voice of protagonist Rumi, took home the best song award. During her speech, EJAE shared her connection to the material: When writing this song, I found myself living vicariously through my character Rumi. Her life and journey in the movie felt deeply familiar to me. She expressed gratitude for the song's impact, noting that it did the same for me, but most importantly for it to be giving hope so many people around the world is truly the greatest honor. The animated feature has become Netflix's most-watched title ever. The story follows Huntrix, a fictional K-pop girl group whose members battle underworld monsters. The film's soundtrack spent multiple weeks in Billboard's top 10, while Golden reached number one on the Hot 100 chart. Directors Maggie Kang and Chris Appelhans accepted the animated feature award alongside the voice cast. A sequel is currently in development at Netflix and Sony Animation.
